case_title: BANK OF AMERICA VS. YAN QIONG LI et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YAN QIONG DOES 1 THROUGH 30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-03-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-02-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-18-2008

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 30, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, YAN QIONG $14,131.19 PRINCIPAL, $1,652.49 INTEREST, $378.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,161.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-03-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
